---
title: "NICE Framework v2"
subtitle: "Workforce Framework for Cybersecurity (NIST SP 800-181r1)"
jurisdiction: "US"
framework-type: "Workforce"
organizing-units: 41
elements: 2115
license: "Public domain"
date: 2026-05-08
date-modified: 2026-05-08
categories: [workforce, us]
---

## At a glance

| | |
|---|---|
| Steward | NIST (National Initiative for Cybersecurity Careers and Studies) |
| Canonical page | [NICE Framework Resource Center](https://www.nist.gov/itl/applied-cybersecurity/nice/nice-framework-resource-center) |
| Version | 2.0.0 |
| Released | 2024-03 |
| Source format | NIST Cybersecurity and Privacy Reference Tool (CPRT) JSON export |
| License | Public domain (works of the United States Government) |
| `framework_summary` slug | `nice-v2` |

## Structure in cybed: terms

::: {.column-page}

```{=html}
<figure class="schema-diagram">
<button type="button" class="toggle-all" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Toggle schema names for all elements"><span class="toggle-icon" aria-hidden="true">▸</span><span class="toggle-text">schema names</span></button>
<svg viewBox="0 0 680 310" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-labelledby="nice-structure-title">
  <title id="nice-structure-title">NICE Framework structural mapping</title>
  <defs><marker id="nice-arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8.5" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.55"/></marker></defs>
  <g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none" opacity="0.55">
    <line x1="340" y1="58" x2="340" y2="100" marker-end="url(#nice-arrow)"/>
    <line x1="220" y1="172" x2="130" y2="220" marker-end="url(#nice-arrow)"/>
    <line x1="340" y1="172" x2="340" y2="220" marker-end="url(#nice-arrow)"/>
    <line x1="460" y1="172" x2="550" y2="220" marker-end="url(#nice-arrow)"/>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Framework">
    <rect x="260" y="20" width="160" height="40" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.10)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="340" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Framework</text>
    <text class="lt" x="340" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">nice:Framework</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Work role">
    <rect x="180" y="100" width="320" height="72" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.16)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="340" y="142" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Work role</text>
    <text class="lt" x="340" y="124" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">nice:WorkRole</text>
    <text class="lt" x="340" y="143" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">= cybed:Role</text>
    <text class="lt" x="340" y="159" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">= cybed:OrganizingUnit</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Task">
    <rect x="50" y="220" width="160" height="60" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.10)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="130" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Task</text>
    <text class="lt" x="130" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">nice:Task</text>
    <text class="lt" x="130" y="263" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">= cybed:RoleElement</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Knowledge statement">
    <rect x="260" y="220" width="160" height="60" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.10)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="340" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Knowledge statement</text>
    <text class="lt" x="340" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="11.5" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">nice:KnowledgeStatement</text>
    <text class="lt" x="340" y="263" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">= cybed:RoleElement</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Skill statement">
    <rect x="470" y="220" width="160" height="60" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.10)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="550" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Skill statement</text>
    <text class="lt" x="550" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">nice:SkillStatement</text>
    <text class="lt" x="550" y="263" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">= cybed:RoleElement</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-edge-label" aria-label="Framework-to-work-role connection">
    <text class="ep" x="348" y="84" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="11.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">contains</text>
    <text class="et" x="348" y="84" font-family="JetBrains Mono,monospace" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">cybed:hasOrganizingUnit</text>
  </g>
  <g class="cyb-edge-label" aria-label="Work-role-to-element connection">
    <text class="ep" x="332" y="200" text-anchor="end" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="11.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">has element</text>
    <text class="et" x="332" y="200" text-anchor="end" font-family="JetBrains Mono,monospace" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">cybed:hasElement</text>
  </g>
</svg>
<figcaption>Click any box or edge label to flip between plain English and the technical schema name.</figcaption>
</figure>
```

:::

## Counts

| Measure | Value |
|---|---|
| Work roles (organizing units) | 41 |
| Strict elements (numbered statements) | 2,115 |
| With-examples elements | 2,115 |
| Examples (separate from elements) | 0 |
| Elements per work role (strict and with-examples) | 51.6 |

NICE's strict and with-examples counts are identical. The framework
encodes detail entirely in numbered statements, so the ingestion has
no prose-embedded clarifications or annex examples to lift into
separate `cybed:Example` nodes.

## Provenance

::: {.provenance-cards .column-page}

::: {.provenance-card}
<svg class="provenance-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-archive"/></svg>

**Source**

NIST's CPRT JSON export. Retrieval URL and reference checksum live in the package's `provenance.yml`.
:::

::: {.provenance-card}
<svg class="provenance-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-gear"/></svg>

**Ingestion**

`scripts/010-ingest-nice.R` parses the CPRT structure into the cybed schema. Stage the JSON file at `data/raw/nice/cprt-export.json` per `docs/framework-data-sources.md`.
:::

::: {.provenance-card}
<svg class="provenance-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-license"/></svg>

**License**

NIST CPRT data is in the US public domain. The package does not bundle the source JSON. Users stage it locally.
:::

:::

## Caveats

- DCWF aligns to NICE and **shares element identifiers across the two frameworks**. Summing element counts across NICE and DCWF will double-count shared identifiers. Filter on `framework_slug` when summing.
- The ingested data reflects the **CPRT export retrieved at ingestion time**. Re-run the ingestion script against a newer export to pick up subsequent NICE versions.
- A small number of work roles **carry a disproportionate share of element coverage**. See the [top NICE work roles query](../queries/top-work-roles.qmd).

## Related

- [DCWF v5.1](dcwf-v51.qmd), the DoD's NICE-aligned counterpart.
- [Cross-framework density spread](../queries/density-spread.qmd),
  where NICE sits in the corpus ranking.
- [Top NICE work roles](../queries/top-work-roles.qmd), the power-law
  distribution across the 41 roles.
- [The vocabulary](../concepts/vocabulary.qmd), on how `nice:WorkRole`
  relates to `cybed:Role` and `cybed:OrganizingUnit`.
